subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call and thy turning, and We have turned toward thee and made mention of thee with that which no fragrance shall ever fade through the eternity of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندآئک و اقبالک اقبلنا الیک و ذکرناک بما لاینفد عرفه بدوام اسماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
